# llms.txt - AI discoverability for prasen.dev

> Prasenjit Nayak's personal portfolio and technical blog.

## About

Prasenjit Nayak is a Full Stack Developer from Odisha, India, specializing in React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Node.js. He builds modern web applications, contributes to open source, and writes about web development.

## Pages

- [Home](https://prasen.dev): Portfolio homepage with projects, skills, work experience, and social links.
- [Blog](https://prasen.dev/blog): Technical articles about web development, React, Next.js, AI tools, and software engineering.
- [Projects](https://prasen.dev/projects): Web applications and open source projects.
- [Videos](https://prasen.dev/videos): YouTube videos about software development and technology.
- [Gadgets](https://prasen.dev/gadgets): Developer tech setup, PC components, and productivity tools.

## Key Projects

- [PayBrackets](https://paybrackets.com): A free US take-home pay calculator for the 2026 tax year covering all 50 states and D.C., with federal and state tax breakdowns and hourly to salary conversion.
- [Next.js Learning Platform](https://learn.prasen.dev): A free, open-source interactive learning platform for mastering Next.js with 17 structured chapters.
- [RepoStar](https://github.com/StarKnightt/RepoStar): Browse trending GitHub repositories with filtering and search.
- [CleanType](https://github.com/StarKnightt/CleanType): A modern typing practice application.
- [DateUp](https://github.com/StarKnightt/DateUp): AI-powered dating profile enhancer.

## Technical Stack

Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript, Python
Frontend: React, Next.js, TailwindCSS, Framer Motion
Backend: Node.js, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Redis
Tools: Git, Docker, Cursor, Claude

- GitHub: https://github.com/StarKnightt
